Text.TableReady: The table is ready. Pick the racers and build your cockroaches.
Text.SupportDeath: cannot handle the strain before the main dash even starts.
Text.OutcomeObstacleCrit: {name} blasts through the barrier at full throttle thanks to “{technique}”.
Text.OutcomeObstacleCritFail: {name} crashes into the obstacle and loses every bit of momentum.
Text.OutcomeObstacleFail: {name} stumbles at the barrier and loses the pace.
Text.OutcomeObstacleSuccess: {name} clears the obstacle cleanly and stays in the race.
Text.SprintBand30: This is no longer a cockroach. This is a legend of speed.
Text.SprintBand25: The shell vibrates from the sheer pace.
Text.SprintBand20: Its legs blur so fast the whole table hums.
Text.SprintBand15: A strong, compact burst with full control.
Text.SprintBand10: The cockroach is moving confidently, just without miracles.
Text.SprintBand1: There is speed here, but not enough sharpness in this burst.
Text.SprintBand0: The burst fizzles out and the cockroach barely advances.
Text.ObstaclePending: The obstacle was not cleared. The player decides whether to spend luck.
Text.ObstacleCritFailEffect: +1 fatigue and a -10 ft sprint penalty.
Text.ObstacleDeath: drops out of the race after slamming into the obstacle.
Text.AcceptFailure: {name} accepts the failed obstacle and gains +1 fatigue.
Text.AcceptFailureDeath: cannot withstand the strain after the failure.
Text.NotCollected: Cockroach {name} died and was not added to the collection.
Text.NoSurvivors: All participants dropped out. The results have been recorded.
Text.LuckReroll: {name} spends luck and rerolls the obstacle.
Text.LuckQuestion: The obstacle failed. What do we do?
Text.EmptyState: No players found. Assign characters to users or drag actors into the game window.
Text.RuleRound1: Support: DC 15, then obstacle DC 12 and sprint.
Text.RuleRound2: Support: DC 20, then obstacle DC 17 and sprint.
Text.RuleRound3: Support: DC 25, then obstacle DC 22 and sprint.
Text.RuleEnd: Fatigue limit. If fatigue exceeds END, the cockroach dies.
Text.RuleMob: Sprint bonus. Race distance is measured in feet.
Text.RuleLuck: Lets you reroll a failed obstacle instead of accepting the failure.
Text.RuleOrder1: In the support phase, each player chooses one of three techniques and confirms the choice.
Text.RuleOrder2: After the obstacle, players with luck decide whether to reroll or accept the failure.
Text.RuleOrder3: After three rounds, the winner gains +1 to one stat and is saved as an item.
Text.HelpIntro1: {title} is a three-round race with support, obstacle, and sprint phases.
Text.HelpIntro2: A player first boosts their champion with a technique, then the cockroach clears an obstacle, and finally makes the main burst down the track.
Text.HelpIntro3: The living participant with the greatest distance wins. If nobody survives, the game still records the results and removes the dead cockroaches.

ath.name: Athletics
supportFailure: {trainer} throws off the rhythm and almost clips {bug}.
obstacleCriticalSuccess: {bug} clears the obstacle with a spectacular Athletics trick!
obstacleSuccess: {bug} gets through the obstacle with Athletics.
obstacleFailure: {bug} stumbles at the obstacle after the Athletics setup.

acr.name: Acrobatics
supportSuccess: {bug} strings feints together like a circus performer.
supportFailure: {bug} tangles the line with one flourish too many.
obstacleCriticalSuccess: {bug} clears the obstacle with a spectacular Acrobatics trick!
obstacleSuccess: {bug} gets through the obstacle with Acrobatics.
obstacleFailure: {bug} stumbles at the obstacle after the Acrobatics setup.

thi.name: Thievery
supportSuccess: {trainer} quietly makes the track nastier for rival roaches.
supportFailure: {trainer} mixes up the markers and sabotages their own champion.
obstacleCriticalSuccess: {bug} clears the obstacle with a spectacular Thievery trick!
obstacleSuccess: {bug} gets through the obstacle with Thievery.
obstacleFailure: {bug} stumbles at the obstacle after the Thievery setup.

ste.name: Stealth
ste.failureText: Sprint uses d12 instead of d20.
supportSuccess: {bug} vanishes on the track and slips out of sight.
supportFailure: {trainer} hides {bug} so well that the pace is lost.
obstacleCriticalSuccess: {bug} clears the obstacle with a spectacular Stealth trick!
obstacleSuccess: {bug} gets through the obstacle with Stealth.
obstacleFailure: {bug} stumbles at the obstacle after the Stealth setup.

supportSuccess: {trainer} wraps {bug} in a spell of speed.
supportFailure: The magical surge slams into {bug} too hard.
obstacleCriticalSuccess: {bug} clears the obstacle with a spectacular Arcana trick!
obstacleSuccess: {bug} gets through the obstacle with Arcana.
obstacleFailure: {bug} stumbles at the obstacle after the Arcana setup.

occ.name: Occultism
occ.successText: A random enemy runs with Misfortune.
supportSuccess: {trainer} tugs at the hidden threads of someone else's luck.
supportFailure: A forbidden whisper rattles {bug} before the run.
obstacleCriticalSuccess: {bug} clears the obstacle with a spectacular Occultism trick!
obstacleSuccess: {bug} gets through the obstacle with Occultism.
obstacleFailure: {bug} stumbles at the obstacle after the Occultism setup.

obstacleSuccess: {bug} gets through the obstacle with Religion.
obstacleFailure: {bug} stumbles at the obstacle after the Religion setup.

supportSuccess: {trainer} awakens a wild sense of the track in {bug}.
supportFailure: {bug}'s instincts fail at the worst part of the course.
obstacleCriticalSuccess: {bug} clears the obstacle with a spectacular Nature trick!
obstacleSuccess: {bug} gets through the obstacle with Nature.
obstacleFailure: {bug} stumbles at the obstacle after the Nature setup.

soc.name: Society
soc.successText: The leader gets +5 ft before sprint.
soc.failureText: The leader gets -5 ft before sprint.
supportSuccess: {trainer} whips up the crowd and pushes the arena leader forward.
supportFailure: {trainer} turns the audience against whoever is ahead.
obstacleCriticalSuccess: {bug} clears the obstacle with a spectacular Society trick!
obstacleSuccess: {bug} gets through the obstacle with Society.
obstacleFailure: {bug} stumbles at the obstacle after the Society setup.

dec.name: Deception
dec.successText: All enemies get -5 ft in sprint.
dec.failureText: Your roach gets -10 ft in sprint.
supportSuccess: {trainer} plants the perfect fake tell about the slipper.
supportFailure: The bluff falls apart too early.
obstacleCriticalSuccess: {bug} clears the obstacle with a spectacular Deception trick!
obstacleSuccess: {bug} gets through the obstacle with Deception.
obstacleFailure: {bug} stumbles at the obstacle after the Deception setup.

obstacleSuccess: {bug} gets through the obstacle with Diplomacy.
